text.tspan: Total contributions to our COVID-19 data repository
Cumulative number of user contributions to Our World in Data's COVID-19 data repository on GitHub. Contributions
can include creating a GitHub issue, creating a pull request, or commenting on an existing issue or pull request.
Data source: Our World in Data (2024)
